results.title: Republican candidates lag behind Bodnar, Forstag in fundraising over last quarter
results.description: It’s a different story for Republican U.S. Rep. Troy Downing, whose race in the eastern congressional district is a near-guaranteed win and has far outraised his Democratic opponent Brian Miller.

results.title: Longview mulls ending parking limits of less than 2 hours downtown
results.description: The city is also considering adding parking lot permits for Longview residents.

results.title: Metatek-Group Ltd.: Metatek Signs Follow-On Contract and Additional Contract in Central Asia
results.description: Calgary, Alberta--(Newsfile Corp. - July 17, 2026) - Metatek-Group Ltd. (TSX: MTEK) ("Metatek" or the "Company"), the exclusive global provider of Enhanced Full Tensor Gravity Gradiometry ("eFTG")...
